title: SpaceSky
description: A space-themed sky overlay featuring Mars as the main planet and Earth visible in the universe
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2c3e5703657d7d88950d1227acff2dfb769861.jpeg)

**SpaceSky** is a sky overlay designed to be layered on top of the default sky or combined with any texture pack.

The goal is to enhance the atmosphere without altering your blocks or gameplay visuals, making it compatible with almost any pack.

### 🌌 Features

- Custom space sky
- Mars as the main celestial body
- Earth visible in the background
- Designed to stay readable during gameplay

### Requirements

- Needs OptiFine
- Custom Sky: ON
- Stars: ON
- Sun & Moon: ON
